title: SWFOC AI System Decompilation — Agent 3D Output
description: Comprehensive map of the Alamo engine AI decision loop, subsystems, enable/disable mechanisms, production queue, diplomacy, and difficulty systems. Derived from Ghidra static analysis of StarWarsG.exe (x86_64).

architecture_overview.summary: The AI system is a hierarchical, goal-driven architecture centered on the TheAIClass singleton. Each non-human player gets an AIPlayerClass instance containing 7 ServicedAISystem subsystems. The system uses a perception-planning-execution loop with per-mode specializations (Galactic, Space, Land). Production is handled by a FiniteStateMachine-based AIBuildTaskClass with 25 named states. Diplomacy is event-driven (AllyEventClass) rather than polled. Difficulty is managed by DifficultyAdjustmentManagerClass (a database manager of DifficultyAdjustmentClass records).
key_design_patterns: Singleton pattern (TheAIClass, TheAIDataManagerClass, TheAIPlayerTypeManagerClass, TheAIGoalTypeManagerClass, TheAITemplateManagerClass)
ServicedAISystemClass — base class for all tickable AI subsystems (inherits AIDiagnosticsClass, stores owner reference at +0x0)
PerceptualEvaluatorClass hierarchy — 20+ evaluator types for sensing game state
Signal/Listener pattern — AILearningSystemClass uses SignalListenerClass + SignalGeneratorClass
Lua binding wrappers — LuaMemberFunctionWrapper<T> for exposing AI internals to Lua scripts
DatabaseObjectManagerClass<T> — manages typed collections (goals, templates, difficulty adjustments)

TheAIClass.description: Top-level AI singleton. Constructed with field_0x4 = 1, field_0x0 = 0x01010101 (4-byte enable/state flags). Manages all AI player instances. Access via SingletonInstance<class_TheAIClass> (ctor/dtor at 0x7EED80).

fields.name: state_flags
fields.description: Written as 0x01010101 in constructor. 4 individual byte flags. Likely per-state enable bits (galactic, space, land, global).

fields.name: active_flag
fields.description: Set to 1 in constructor. Probable global AI-active flag.

TheAIDataManagerClass.description: Stores global AI configuration data. Has 8 undefined8 fields initialized to 0 at offsets 0x38..0x70.

TheAIPlayerTypeManagerClass.description: Manages AI player type definitions. Uses a hash map (load factor 0x3f800000 = 1.0f). Maps player types to AI behavior profiles.

TheAIGoalTypeManagerClass.description: Manages all AI goal type definitions. Database of AIGoalTypeClass objects.

TheAIGoalProposalFunctionSetManagerClass.description: Manages sets of goal proposal functions. These are the scoring functions that rank which goals the AI should pursue.

TheAITemplateManagerClass.description: Manages AI template definitions (build orders, force compositions, etc.). Database of AITemplateClass objects.

AIPlayerClass.description: Per-player AI controller. Created for each AI-controlled player slot. Inherits AIDiagnosticsClass. Contains references to all 7 subsystems. Constructor takes 2 params: likely (player_ptr, ai_type_ptr).

fields.name: param_1_ref
fields.description: First constructor param — likely pointer to owning PlayerClass

fields.name: param_2_ref
fields.description: Second constructor param — likely pointer to AIPlayerTypeClass

fields.name: subsystem_0
fields.description: Initialized to 0. Subsystem slot (likely perception)

fields.name: subsystem_1
fields.description: Initialized to 0. Subsystem slot (likely planning)

fields.name: subsystem_2
fields.description: Initialized to 0. Subsystem slot (likely goal)

fields.name: subsystem_3
fields.description: Initialized to 0. Subsystem slot (likely execution)

fields.name: state_or_mode
fields.description: Initialized to 0xFFFFFFFF (-1). Likely current game mode enum or uninitialized sentinel.

subsystems._note: All subsystems inherit ServicedAISystemClass, which inherits AIDiagnosticsClass. ServicedAISystemClass stores a reference to the owning AIPlayerClass at data+0x00 and has a field at data+0x08 initialized to 0.

ServicedAISystemClass.description: Base class for all 7 AI subsystems. Provides tick/service interface via vtable virtual methods. Stores owning AIPlayerClass reference.

fields.name: owner_ai_player
fields.description: Pointer to the AIPlayerClass that owns this subsystem. Passed as param_1 in constructor.

fields.name: service_counter_or_state
fields.description: Initialized to 0. Likely tick counter or active/inactive state.

AIPerceptionSystemClass.description: Senses the game world. Feeds evaluator results into the planning system. Contains a hash map of PerceptionParameterBindings and a linked list of perception data.

GalacticPerceptionSystemClass.description: Galactic map perception. 3 extra pointer/counter fields for planet-level sensing.

TacticalPerceptionGridClass.description: Grid-based perception for tactical modes. Uses PerceptionGridEntryClass linked list.

AIPlanningSystemClass.description: Generates plans from perception data and goal proposals. Contains a doubly-linked list (node size 0x20) for plan entries. Hash map (buckets=7, load=1.0). Planning interval stored as float 0x40800000 = 4.0 (at offset 0x10 — likely 4.0 seconds between plan recalculations).

fields.name: plan_interval
fields.description: 4.0f — seconds between planning cycles

fields.name: plan_linked_list_head
fields.description: Doubly-linked list node (allocated as 0x20 bytes, self-referencing sentinel)

AIGoalSystemClass.description: Manages active goals. Inherits ServicedAISystemClass. Contains an AIBudgetClass instance (at data+0x158) for resource allocation. Two large internal structures (initialized via FUN_140721360) at data+0x00 and data+0xA0 — likely active-goals list and completed-goals list.

GalacticGoalSystemClass.description: Galactic-mode goals. Pure vtable override of AIGoalSystemClass.

fields.name: goal_collection_1
fields.description: Initialized by FUN_140721360. Likely active goals container.

fields.name: goal_collection_2
fields.description: Initialized by FUN_140721360. Likely pending/completed goals.

fields.name: budget
fields.description: Embedded AIBudgetClass instance for this goal system's resource budget.

AIExecutionSystemClass.description: Executes planned actions (movement, attacks, ability usage). 4 pointer fields + inherits ServicedAISystemClass.

AILearningSystemClass.description: Tracks AI performance history. Inherits ServicedAISystemClass + MultiLinkedListMember + SignalListenerClass. Contains 5 hash maps and multiple counters. Stores historical data about build effectiveness, combat outcomes, etc. Very large struct (~0x198+ bytes of own data).

AITemplateSystemClass.description: Manages force templates (predefined army compositions). Contains a linked list of active template instances. Inherits ServicedAISystemClass.

fields.name: template_linked_list_head
fields.description: Doubly-linked sentinel node (0x18 bytes). Stores active force templates.

AIBudgetClass.description: Resource budget allocator for the AI goal system. Inherits AIDiagnosticsClass. Contains a hash map of BudgetedCategoryStruct entries. Tracks allocated, spent, and remaining budget per category.

fields.name: hash_map_sentinel
fields.description: Self-referencing sentinel for budget category hash map

fields.name: owner_ref
fields.description: Reference to owning system (passed as param_1)

AIBuildTaskClass.description: FiniteStateMachineClass<enum_BuildTaskStates>. The core production unit. Each build task is a refcounted, signal-listening state machine that progresses through 25 named states from INIT_TASK to ALL_FINISHED. Multiple AIBuildTaskClass instances can be active simultaneously per AI player, managed via MultiLinkedListClass<class_AIBuildTaskClass>.

BUILD_STATE_PRODUCTION_QUEUED.description: Production request queued. Polls game state via DAT_140b15418 (global game clock/state). Checks credit availability and population caps (query types 0x5F, 0x60 on game object properties).

BUILD_STATE_FREESTORE_ALLOC.description: Allocates from the free store. Transitions to state 6 (PRODUCTION_END) on enter.

BUILD_STATE_GROUND_UNIT_PRODUCTION.description: Ground unit being produced. Calls FUN_140648120 on enter.

BUILD_STATE_PRODUCTION_BEGIN.description: Production started. Runs EVENT_Update poll loop same as state 2.

BUILD_STATE_PRODUCTION_END.description: Production completed. Unregisters signal listeners. Calls FUN_140647ee0 (production finalize). If flag at +0xD0 is set, skips budget release.

BUILD_STATE_PRODUCTION_FAILED.description: Production failed. Releases budget via FUN_1405fdd90. Notifies free store via FUN_1404d4ee0. Transitions to cleanup.

BUILD_STATE_PRODUCTION_FINISHED.description: Completed successfully. Calls FUN_14064ad00 on enter.

BUILD_STATE_DEPENDANT_WAIT.description: Waiting for dependent tasks. Checks offset_0xB8 (dependent task list) count at +0x30. Transitions to state 0xB when count reaches 0.

BUILD_STATE_PATHING_DEST.description: Pathfinding to destination. Creates MovementBlockStatus. Uses AIExecutionPathFinder. Handles galactic object containment hierarchy (checks +0x335, +0x336, +0x337 on game objects — component lookup table entries).

BUILD_STATE_PRE_PATH_SEPERATE.description: Pre-pathfinding separation. Issues FleetManagementEvents to split units for movement.

BUILD_STATE_WAIT_FOR_ALL.description: Waiting for all sub-tasks to complete. Checks galactic mode (offset 0x34 in mode struct). Transitions to 0x13 (TRANSPORTS_TO_ORBIT) or 8 (PRODUCTION_FINISHED).

BUILD_STATE_DO_TASK_FORCE_MERGE.description: Executing task force merge. Calls FUN_140512160 to check merge completion.

BUILD_STATE_WAIT_FOR_CREDITS.description: Waiting for sufficient credits. Transitions to 0x12 (BUILD_TASK_LIST) on enter.

BUILD_STATE_BUILD_TASK_LIST.description: Building the task list. Calls FUN_140648980 on enter.

BUILD_STATE_TRANSPORTS_TO_ORBIT.description: Moving transports to orbit. Issues FleetManagementEvents for orbital transfer.

BUILD_STATE_READY_TO_MERGE.description: Ready to merge. Checks task force type and decides between JOIN_TASK_FORCE (0xD) or DO_TASK_FORCE_MERGE (0x10).

BUILD_STATE_ALL_FINISHED.description: All production tasks complete. Terminal state.

BUILD_STATE_WAIT_FOR_FREESTORE_ALLOC.description: Waiting for free store allocation. Complex state with multiple paths: ground production (state 4), fleet merge (state 0xE), or sync move (state 0x18). Checks object hierarchy via component_lookup_table entries.

BUILD_STATE_HIJACK_UNIT.description: Hijacking an existing unit for the build task. Calls FUN_140648370 on enter.

BUILD_STATE_SYNC_MOVE_COUNTDOWN.description: Countdown timer for sync move. Decrements float at +0xD8 by elapsed time. When timer <= threshold at +0xD4, calls FUN_14064a1f0 (execute synchronized move).

fields.name: current_state
fields.description: Written with the state ID on each state entry

fields.name: current_state_name
fields.description: Debug string pointer — the state name (e.g., 'BUILD_STATE_INIT_TASK')

fields.name: transition_pending
fields.description: Set to 1 when a state transition is requested

fields.name: next_state
fields.description: Target state for pending transition

fields.name: current_event_name
fields.description: Debug: 'EVENT_Enter', 'EVENT_Update'

fields.name: target_game_object
fields.description: The game object being produced or the production target location

fields.name: production_structure
fields.description: The building/structure performing the production. Null for non-structure tasks.

fields.name: build_type_ref
fields.description: GameObjectTypeClass pointer for what to build

fields.name: destination_object
fields.description: Where to send the produced unit

fields.name: owning_ai_player
fields.description: Pointer to AIPlayerClass (used heavily to access subsystems via +0xF0)

fields.name: movement_block_status
fields.description: MovementBlockStatus for pathfinding states

fields.name: skip_budget_release_flag
fields.description: When set, PRODUCTION_END skips budget release

fields.name: sync_move_threshold
fields.description: Timer threshold for SYNC_MOVE_COUNTDOWN state

AIPlanetBuildTaskClass.description: Planet-level build task. Managed via MultiLinkedListClass<class_AIPlanetBuildTaskClass>. Coordinates multiple AIBuildTaskClass instances for a single planet.

AIFreeStoreClass.description: Manages available (unallocated) units that the AI can commandeer for goals. Lua-exposed via LuaMemberFunctionWrapper<class_AIFreeStoreClass>. Has registered Lua method 'Get_Object_Count'. Contains hash maps for tracking allocated vs. free units.

ProduceForceBlockStatus.description: Blocking status for force production. Inherits LuaMemberFunctionWrapper<class_BlockingStatus>. Used in Lua scripts via _ProduceObject. Lua scripts call this and it blocks until production completes.

evaluator_hierarchy.description: The perception system uses a hierarchy of PerceptualEvaluatorClass subclasses. Each evaluator scores a different aspect of the game world. Results feed into the planning system's goal proposal scoring.

PerceptionParameterBindingsClass.description: Binds perception parameters (thresholds, weights) to evaluator instances. Multiple constructors for different contexts.

PerceptionGridEntryClass.description: Entry in the tactical perception grid. Stores per-cell sensing data.

ai_enable_disable_mechanism.description: AI enable/disable operates at multiple levels: (1) TheAIClass singleton state_flags (0x01010101 = all active), (2) Per-player Is_Human flag on PlayerObject, (3) Per-unit Prevent_AI_Usage Lua method, (4) Suspend_AI global Lua function (time-based), (5) Player::Enable_As_Actor() Lua method. The AI system checks Is_Human on the player to decide whether to create an AIPlayerClass. The Suspend_AI function likely sets a timer on the TheAIClass singleton that suppresses all AI ticking.

global_ai_singleton.description: The TheAIClass constructor writes 0x01010101 to offset 0x00 (4 byte flags, likely per-mode: galactic=0x01, space=0x01, land=0x01, global=0x01) and 1 to offset 0x04. Setting these to 0 would disable AI globally.

per_player_control.description: PlayerObject has Is_Human and IsHumanControlled methods. AI-controlled players have Is_Human returning false. Enable_As_Actor() on a PlayerWrapper activates AI for that player. The engine checks these flags when creating/destroying AIPlayerClass instances.

per_unit_control.warning: Crashes in tactical if unit has no active AI (community-documented bug).
per_unit_control.description: Blocks AI from issuing commands to a specific unit. Useful for cinematic sequences or player-controlled units in AI factions.

temporal_suspension.description: Pauses all AI processing for a specified number of seconds. Used during cinematics. Likely sets a countdown timer on TheAIClass or on the game clock that suppresses ServicedAISystemClass::Service calls.

diplomacy_system.description: Diplomacy in the Alamo engine is NOT a continuous state machine — it is event-driven. Alliance/enemy changes are discrete events (AllyEventClass) sent through the ScheduledEventClass system. The PlayerObject stores diplomatic state accessed via Is_Enemy(player) and Is_Ally(player) Lua methods. Make_Ally/Make_Enemy are global Lua functions that fire AllyEventClass events. CRITICAL: diplomatic state resets on every game mode change (galactic<->tactical transition).

AllyEventClass.description: Event fired when alliance state changes between two players. Field at data+0x00 initialized to 0xFFFFFFFF (target player ID, -1 = none).

storage_model.description: Diplomatic state is stored per-player in the PlayerClass/PlayerObject struct. The exact storage is likely a bitfield or array indexed by opposing player_id (up to 8 players). This is NOT stored in a separate diplomacy manager — it is embedded in each PlayerClass instance. The ~PlayerClass destructor (RVA 0x27ED40) cleans up multiple DynamicVectorClass<int> arrays (10 of them in a loop) at offsets within PlayerClass_data — some of these likely hold per-opponent diplomatic flags.
storage_model.diplomatic_arrays_description: 10 DynamicVectorClass<int> arrays cleaned up in ~PlayerClass. These 10 slots match the 10-player capacity. Each likely stores diplomatic state for one opposing player.

DifficultyAdjustmentManagerClass.description: Database manager of DifficultyAdjustmentClass records. Inherits DatabaseUIntConversionClass. Uses a hash map for lookup. Each DifficultyAdjustmentClass record modifies AI parameters (production speed, income multiplier, combat bonuses, etc.) based on difficulty setting.

fields.name: difficulty_name_string
fields.description: SSO string (capacity 0x0F) for difficulty level name

AIDiagnosticsClass.description: Base class for all AI classes that support diagnostic logging. Provides debug info tracking. The AIDiagnosticsClass is the common ancestor of virtually every AI class — AIPlayerClass, all ServicedAISystemClass subclasses, AIBudgetClass, BudgetedCategoryStruct, InstantiatedGoalClass all inherit from it.

fields.name: diagnostics_data
fields.description: Diagnostic tracking field. Set to 0 in most constructors. Likely frame counter or tick timestamp.

AIDiagnosticsManagerClass.description: Singleton managing all AI diagnostics. Receives diagnostic data from all AIDiagnosticsClass instances.

AILogWindow.description: Debug log window for AI. Inherits LogWindowItem. Initialized at static address 0xB39140 with atexit destructor. Title is 'AI Log'.

InstantiatedGoalClass.description: A live goal instance. Multiple inheritance: RefCountClass + SignalListenerClass + AIDiagnosticsClass. Contains references to goal type, owning system, priority, and state.

fields.name: param_1_ref
fields.description: Constructor param_1 — likely the goal type or owning goal system

AIGoalProposalFunctionSetClass.description: Set of proposal scoring functions for a goal type. Managed by TheAIGoalProposalFunctionSetManagerClass.

target_location_system.description: AI target locations are wrappers around game positions that the AI uses for goal targeting.

AIHintZoneClass.description: Map hint zones that guide AI behavior. Used by Find_Hint Lua function. Contains two hash maps (unit lists for zone). Fields at data+0xB8 = category_id (0xFFFFFFFF initially), data+0xBC = priority (1).

AIExecutionPathFinderClass.description: Pathfinding for AI execution plans. Used by AIBuildTaskClass in PATHING_DEST states.

task_force_system.description: Task forces are collections of units organized for coordinated action. Each game mode has its own task force class.

TaskForceDefinitionClass.description: Template definition for a task force composition.

DAT_140b15418.description: Global pointer checked in AIBuildTaskClass state machine. When non-null, calls vtable method at +0xE0 to get current game time. When null, falls back to DAT_140b153fc. This is the game clock / frame counter accessor.

DAT_140b153fc.description: Fallback game state value when DAT_140b15418 is null.

DAT_140b168c8.description: Global int used as capacity threshold in BUILD_STATE_PATHING_DEST. Compared against FUN_1403f9530 result (current force count on a planet).

class_hierarchy_summary.description: Complete AI class inheritance tree as recovered from RTTI.

global_functions.name: Suspend_AI
global_functions.description: Pauses all AI for N seconds

global_functions.name: GiveDesireBonus
global_functions.description: Modifies AI desire weights for goals

player_methods.name: Enable_As_Actor
player_methods.description: Enables AI actor mode for player

object_methods.name: Prevent_AI_Usage
object_methods.note: Crashes in tactical if unit has no active AI

object_methods.name: Set_As_Goal_System_Removable
object_methods.description: AI goal cleanup flag on TaskForceClass

rva_index._note: All RVAs relative to module base (0x140000000 in Ghidra). For runtime: address = module_base + rva.
